text.title: Junior AI-Overreliance Coaching Guide Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema describing one coaching artefact (PR comment block + intervention level + signals matched).

example.code: { "pr_id": "PR-1234", "signals_matched": [ "library-of-the-day", "undefended-exception" ], "intervention_level": "block", "comment_text": "Two signals: (1) `axios` is new to this codebase \u2014 what about our existing `httpClient`? (2) line 42 swallows IOException silently \u2014 what would happen if the file is missing?", "ask_what_without_ai": true, "shaming_phrases_count": 0 }

example.note: No signals identified but escalating; shaming phrase used; comment too short; missing what-without-AI ask.

forbidden.pattern: Phrases like 'AI slop', 'just copy-pasted', 'didn't think' — names the act not the artefact.
Reviewer pushes their own commits over the junior's AI-overrelied code without explanation.
